asset.title: Workbook Style Toggle
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The walkthrough clearly demonstrates the workbook style toggle feature, transitioning smoothly between Excel, Sheets, and Evidence views while maintaining state consistency.

featureClarity.evidence: The dropdown menu clearly switches between Excel, Sheets, and Evidence modes, updating the spreadsheet presentation instantly.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the entire flow from uploading an Excel file to toggling through different view styles.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-mode interface with well-aligned panels, though the formula bar text is slightly compact.

consistency.evidence: Aligns perfectly with NodeRoom's multi-modal workspace concept, integrating chat, files, and versioned sheets.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Captured directly from a live-running application with realistic financial modeling data.

legibility.evidence: Most UI text is highly legible, though some smaller cell values require close attention.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Directly addresses financial and audit use cases where spreadsheet presentation and provenance are critical.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately represents the feature as a local UI style change while keeping backend traces canonical.

observedEvidence: Dropdown toggle switching between Excel, Sheets, and Evidence views
Cell selection and formula preservation across views

defects.observed: The formula bar text is quite small and slightly difficult to read at standard preview sizes.
defects.fix: Slightly increase the font size of the formula bar or zoom the spreadsheet panel during recording.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Toggle seamlessly between Excel, Sheets, and Evidence views to review financial models with full provenance tracking.
